title: 3D End Crystal
body:
[![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/CurseForge-0?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&color=black)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/bare-bones-connected-glass)
[![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth%20•%20Profile-0?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&color=black)](https://modrinth.com/user/PrincParshia)

<hr>

## 📘 DESCRIPTION

It replaces the flat End Crystal item with a fully 3D model and adds the same animations used by the original End Crystal entity. When held in your hand, it rotates and animates just like the real End Crystal in the world, making it feel more immersive and visually accurate.

<hr>
